output.title: TikTok & Reel Scripts for Tenants: 5 Viral Hooks to Fight Back When Your Landlord Withholds Your Security Deposit
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your deposit? These 5 TikTok hooks & Reel scripts help frustrated tenants fight back and get their money. $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com
content_outline: Hook 1: The Illegal Deduction Shock — Script targeting bogus 'cleaning' and 'damage' deposit withholdings
Hook 2: The Silent Treatment — Script for landlords ghosting tenants after move-out past state deadlines
Hook 3: The Wear vs. Tear Trap — Script educating tenants on non-deductible normal wear and tear
Hook 4: The Demand Letter Power Move — Script demonstrating how to generate legal pressure in 60 seconds
Hook 5: The State Law Flex — Script leveraging state-specific return deadlines and penalty rules for maximum shares
key_points: Hook copy: 'POV: You left the apartment cleaner than when you moved in… but your landlord just charged you $400 for general cleaning.'
Script beat: Landlords cannot legally withhold deposits for normal wear and tear or routine cleaning in most states—state the statute to build instant credibility.
Hook copy: 'It’s been 45 days since move-out. Crickets. No deposit, no list, no explanation. Here’s why they’re already breaking the law.'
Script beat: Cite exact state deadlines (e.g., 21 days CA, 14 days NY, 30 days TX, 45 days FL) to trigger urgency and comment-section engagement.
Hook copy: 'You don’t need a lawyer to scare a shady landlord. You need a demand letter. Let me show you how in 60 seconds.'
Script beat: Walk through Deposits-Back.com: answer a few questions, get a state-specific deposit demand letter instantly for $19.99—no signup, no subscription.
Hook copy: 'My landlord said he could keep my security deposit for 'wear and tear.' Yeah, that’s not how this works.'
Script beat: End with a high-retention CTA loop: 'Comment your state and I’ll tell you the exact deadline your landlord missed—plus how much they might owe you.'
output.cta: Stop letting your landlord steal your deposit. Generate your state-specific security deposit demand letter at Deposits-Back.com in 60 seconds — only $19.99, no sign-up or subscription required.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters aged 18-35 whose landlords are withholding, deducting from, or refusing to return security deposits, active on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and short-form video platforms.
